## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (or tests added for new logic)
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] Mock services still work end-to-end (dashboard, messages, billing load with demo seed)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env.local` values committed
